'''vajana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:swally|swally]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-j-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swally|swally]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vajana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:væjænæth|væjænæth]] || [[word:væjænæj|væjænæj]] || [[word:væjænæsh|væjænæsh]] || [[word:væjænæ|væjænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vajajanath|vajajanath]] || [[word:vajajanaj|vajajanaj]] || [[word:vajajanash|vajajanash]] || [[word:vajajana|vajajana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vajanath|vajanath]] || [[word:vajanaj|vajanaj]] || [[word:vajanash|vajanash]] || [[word:vajana|vajana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vajafnath|vajafnath]] || [[word:vajafnaj|vajafnaj]] || [[word:vajafnash|vajafnash]] || [[word:vajafnaf|vajafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vajanatha|vajanatha]] || [[word:vajanaja|vajanaja]] || [[word:vajanasha|vajanasha]] || [[word:vajanaka|vajanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vajanath|vajanath]] || [[word:vajanaj|vajanaj]] || [[word:vajanash|vajanash]] || [[word:vajana|vajana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vajanathal|vajanathal]] || [[word:vajanajal|vajanajal]] || [[word:vajanashal|vajanashal]] || [[word:vajanakal|vajanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vajanathatha|vajanathatha]] || [[word:vajanajaja|vajanajaja]] || [[word:vajanashasha|vajanashasha]] || [[word:vajanaka|vajanaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vajanathan|vajanathan]] || [[word:vajanajan|vajanajan]] || [[word:vajanashan|vajanashan]] || [[word:vajanakan|vajanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vajanathaoro|vajanathaoro]] || [[word:vajanajaoro|vajanajaoro]] || [[word:vajanashaoro|vajanashaoro]] || [[word:vajanakaoro|vajanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
